note: Per-source registry for speech-listing collection. Agents read this; deterministic code does NOT. listing_urls use a {year} slot. If a listing page is JS-only or has no clean per-year view, agents fall back to search_fallback (a `site:` WebSearch). president_hint is a STARTING guess only — the authoritative roster is registry/roster.json (verified at build).

sources.name: Federal Reserve Board of Governors
sources.listing_hint: Table/list of entries, each with date (M/D/YYYY), speaker (e.g. 'Gov. Christopher J. Waller', 'Chair ...', 'Vice Chair ...'), and a linked title. Covers ALL Board members on one page per year. KEEP ONLY speakers whose member_id is in roster.json (the 7 current governors: warsh, jefferson, bowman, barr, cook, powell, waller). SKIP departed governors such as Stephen Miran. Speech URL pattern: /newsevents/speech/<lastname><YYYYMMDD>a.htm.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York
sources.listing_hint: List of president/EVP speeches by year. Keep only speeches by the BANK PRESIDENT (FOMC participant), not other officers.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Boston
sources.listing_hint: Speeches landing page; filter to the president's remarks since 2025-01-01.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia
sources.listing_hint: Speeches search view. Current president is Anna Paulson (Patrick Harker retired mid-2025). Keep only Paulson's speeches as the current seat-holder; do not attribute Harker's earlier 2025 speeches to the current seat.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland
sources.listing_hint: Speeches collection; keep only the president's speeches.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond
sources.listing_hint: Speeches index, often grouped by president and year.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta
sources.listing_hint: News/speeches listing. The CURRENT Atlanta participant is interim president Cheryl Venable; Raphael Bostic departed. Keep only the current seat-holder's (Venable) speeches; do NOT attribute Bostic's 2025 speeches to the current seat. Atlanta may have few/no 2025+ speeches by the current participant.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago
sources.listing_hint: Speeches index by year; keep only the president's speeches.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
sources.listing_hint: 'From the President' remarks/speeches; keep only the president's speeches.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis
sources.listing_hint: Messages & speeches; the president also publishes long-form essays — include policy essays as speeches.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City
sources.listing_hint: President's speeches are linked from the leadership/president page and the newsroom. Use search fallback if no clean listing.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas
sources.listing_hint: News/speeches listing; keep only the president's speeches.

sources.name: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco
sources.listing_hint: Speeches listing; keep only the president's speeches.
